title: Metrics Analyst Sandbox for Debugging Service Payloads and Responses
description:
Create a sandbox version of the Metrics Analyst / Business Metrics Glossary flow that exposes the exact JSON payloads sent to each service and the raw responses, without persisting sandbox runs.

### Features
- **Service 1 (Analyze Widgets)**: Displays POST body sent to `service_one_stage` and the API response
- **Service 2 (Business Metrics Glossary)**: Displays POST body sent to `service_two_dev` and the API response
- **Configurable Endpoint**: Ability to change the service endpoint URL to test different versions
- **Copy to Clipboard**: Button for each text box to copy payload/response
- **Admin Only**: Middleware restricts access to admin users
- **Dashboard Selection**: Users can still choose which dashboard to analyze

### URL
`/metric-analyst/glossary-sandbox`
acceptance_criteria: Sandbox page shows JSON POST body for Service 1 and Service 2
Raw API responses are displayed for each service
Endpoint URLs can be changed to test different service versions
Copy to clipboard buttons work for each text box
Only admin users can access the sandbox
Sandbox runs are not persisted to the database
ux_changes: New sandbox page at /metric-analyst/glossary-sandbox with text boxes showing JSON payloads and responses for both Metrics Analyst services. Copy-to-clipboard buttons and configurable endpoint URL.
middleware_changes: Reused existing metrics analyst payload generation without database persistence. Admin-only middleware for access control.
api_changes: Sandbox sends same payloads as production to configurable endpoints and displays raw responses.
implementation_notes: Sandbox is available at /metric-analyst/glossary-sandbox on both dev and prod. Admin middleware restricts access. Endpoint URLs are editable to support testing multiple service versions. This enables rapid iteration with the service team.
comment_summary: Developer built the sandbox with JSON payload/response display. Reporter praised the implementation and requested endpoint URL switching and copy-to-clipboard buttons. Developer added both features plus admin-only middleware. Sandbox deployed to prod for testing.
